mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: nocturia, round face, recurrent infectious encephalitis, short stature, severe generalized osteoporosis, edema of the dorsum of feet, pain, rhonchi, hypopituitarism
renal involvement (multiple glomerular cysts, proteinuria), angio-osteodysplasia (abnormal bone structure and mineralization), acroparasthesias (paresthesia or numbness affecting hands and feet)
progressive neurological deterioration with psychiatric symptoms, liver dysfunction, spleenomegaly, pulmonary involvement
coarse facies, mental retardation, corneal cloudiness, skeletal changes, cardiac valvular thickening
hyperlipidemia, splenomegaly, yellowish staining of the skin around the eyes and corners of the mouth
cafe au lait spots, freckles in axillary and inguinal regions, shuffling gait, scoliosis, optic glioma

mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.disease_name: Methylmalonic aciduria and homocystinuria, Cblj type
mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: intellectual disability, characteristic facial features, ectopic lentis, marfanoid body habitus, thromboembolic events
joint hypermobility, fragile skin that bruises easily, abnormally shaped long bones, varicosities
dark urine due to homogentistic acid accumulation, arthritis, heart valve calcification, deafness
